# Font licenses

Fonts vendored here are embedded into `pancake_gui.exe` as byte arrays at build
time (see `cmake/embed_binary.cmake`). No font file is read at runtime.

- `Roboto-Regular.ttf`, `Roboto-Medium.ttf` — Roboto v2.138,
  Copyright Google LLC. Licensed under the Apache License, Version 2.0
  (https://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0).
  Source: https://github.com/googlefonts/roboto/releases/tag/v2.138
- `JetBrainsMono-Regular.ttf` — JetBrains Mono,
  Copyright 2020 The JetBrains Mono Project Authors. Licensed under the
  SIL Open Font License 1.1 (https://openfontlicense.org).
  Source: https://github.com/JetBrains/JetBrainsMono
